commonLabels.description: Labels to add to all chart resources.

extraArgs.description:
Extra arguments to provide to _ExternalDNS_.
An array or map can be used, with maps allowing for value overrides; maps also support slice values to use the same arg multiple times.

Extra arguments to provide to _ExternalDNS_.
An array or map can be used, with maps allowing for value overrides; maps also support slice values to use the same arg multiple times.

fullnameOverride.description: (string) Override the full name of the chart.
(string) Override the full name of the chart.

nameOverride.description: (string) Override the name of the chart.

namespaceOverride.description:
(string) Override the namespace that chart resources are rendered into.
Defaults to the release namespace. Useful when installing the chart as a
subchart that should live in its own namespace, separate from the umbrella
release namespace.

(string) Override the namespace that chart resources are rendered into.
Defaults to the release namespace. Useful when installing the chart as a
subchart that should live in its own namespace, separate from the umbrella
release namespace.

namespaced.description: if `true`, _ExternalDNS_ will run in a namespaced scope (`Role`` and `Rolebinding`` will be namespaced too).

mountPath.description: Mount path for the `Secret`, this can be templated.
Mount path for the `Secret`, this can be templated.

subPath.description: Sub-path for mounting the `Secret`, this can be templated.
Sub-path for mounting the `Secret`, this can be templated.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account. Templates are allowed in both the key and the value. Example: `example.com/annotation/{{ .Values.nameOverride }}: {{ .Values.nameOverride }}`
Annotations to add to the service account. Templates are allowed in both the key and the value. Example: `example.com/annotation/{{ .Values.nameOverride }}: {{ .Values.nameOverride }}`

name.description: (string) If this is set and `serviceAccount.create` is `true` this will be used for the created `ServiceAccount` name, if set and `serviceAccount.create` is `false` then this will define an existing `ServiceAccount` to use.

sourceNamespace.description:
Source namespace to watch for Kubernetes resources other than Gateway API gateways.
Used only when `namespaced=true`. Defaults to Release.Namespace

Source namespace to watch for Kubernetes resources other than Gateway API gateways.
Used only when `namespaced=true`. Defaults to Release.Namespace

sources.description: _Kubernetes_ resources to monitor for DNS entries.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for `Pod` [scheduling](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/). If an explicit label selector is not provided one will be created from the pod selector labels.

txtSuffix.description:
(string) Specify a suffix for the domain names of TXT records created for the `txt` registry.
Mutually exclusive with `txtPrefix`.

affinity.description: Affinity settings for `Pod` [scheduling](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/). If an explicit label selector is not provided for pod affinity or pod anti-affinity one will be created from the pod selector labels.

annotationFilter.description: Filter resources queried for endpoints by annotation selector.

annotationPrefix.description: Annotation prefix for external-dns annotations (useful for split horizon DNS with multiple instances).

automountServiceAccountToken.description: (bool) Set this to `false` to [opt out of API credential automounting](https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-service-account/#opt-out-of-api-credential-automounting) for the `Pod`.

commonLabels.description: Labels to add to all chart resources.

dnsConfig.description: (object) [DNS config](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/dns-pod-service/#pod-dns-config) for the pod, if not set the default will be used.

dnsPolicy.description: (string) [DNS policy](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/dns-pod-service/#pod-s-dns-policy) for the pod, if not set the default will be used.

domainFilters.description: Limit possible target zones by domain suffixes.

enableGatewayListenerSets.description: if `true`, the Gateway API ListenerSet flag will be enabled.

enabled.description: (bool) No effect - reserved for use in sub-charting.

excludeDomains.description: Intentionally exclude domains from being managed.

extraArgs.description:
Extra arguments to provide to _ExternalDNS_.
An array or map can be used, with maps allowing for value overrides; maps also support slice values to use the same arg multiple times.

extraContainers.description: Extra containers to add to the `Deployment`.

fullnameOverride.description: (string) Override the full name of the chart.

gatewayNamespace.description:
_Gateway API_ gateway namespace to watch.
When `namespaced=true`, setting this value avoids creating any cluster-scoped RBAC
(no ClusterRole/ClusterRoleBinding) for Gateway sources.

labelFilter.description: Filter resources queried for endpoints by label selector.

managedRecordTypes.description: Record types to manage (default: A, AAAA, CNAME)

nameOverride.description: (string) Override the name of the chart.

namespaceOverride.description:
(string) Override the namespace that chart resources are rendered into.
Defaults to the release namespace. Useful when installing the chart as a
subchart that should live in its own namespace, separate from the umbrella
release namespace.

namespaced.description: if `true`, _ExternalDNS_ will run in a namespaced scope (`Role`` and `Rolebinding`` will be namespaced too).

policy.description: How DNS records are synchronized between sources and providers; available values are `create-only`, `sync`, & `upsert-only`.

registry.description:
Specify the registry for storing ownership and labels.
Valid values are `txt`, `aws-sd`, `dynamodb` & `noop`.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: (int) Specify the number of old `ReplicaSets` to retain to allow rollback of the `Deployment``.

enabled.description: If `true`, create a `Secret` to store sensitive provider configuration (**DEPRECATED**).

mountPath.description: Mount path for the `Secret`, this can be templated.

subPath.description: Sub-path for mounting the `Secret`, this can be templated.

ipFamilies.description:
Service IP families (e.g. IPv4 and/or IPv6).
- IPv4
- IPv6

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account. Templates are allowed in both the key and the value. Example: `example.com/annotation/{{ .Values.nameOverride }}: {{ .Values.nameOverride }}`
Annotations to add to the service account. Templates are allowed in both the key and the value. Example: `example.com/annotation/{{ .Values.nameOverride }}: {{ .Values.nameOverride }}`

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Set this to `false` to [opt out of API credential automounting](https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-service-account/#opt-out-of-api-credential-automounting) for the `ServiceAccount`.

labels.description: Labels to add to the service account.

name.description: (string) If this is set and `serviceAccount.create` is `true` this will be used for the created `ServiceAccount` name, if set and `serviceAccount.create` is `false` then this will define an existing `ServiceAccount` to use.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account. Templates are allowed in both the key and the value. Example: `example.com/annotation/{{ .Values.nameOverride }}: {{ .Values.nameOverride }}`

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Set this to `false` to [opt out of API credential automounting](https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-service-account/#opt-out-of-api-credential-automounting) for the `ServiceAccount`.

labels.description: Labels to add to the service account.

name.description: (string) If this is set and `serviceAccount.create` is `true` this will be used for the created `ServiceAccount` name, if set and `serviceAccount.create` is `false` then this will define an existing `ServiceAccount` to use.

namespace.description: (string) If set create the `ServiceMonitor` in an alternate namespace.

bearerTokenFile.description: (string) Provide a bearer token file for the `ServiceMonitor`.

enabled.description: If `true`, create a `ServiceMonitor` resource to support the _Prometheus Operator_.

interval.description: (string) If set override the _Prometheus_ default interval.

metricRelabelings.description: [Metric relabel configs](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs) to apply to samples before ingestion.

namespace.description: (string) If set create the `ServiceMonitor` in an alternate namespace.

relabelings.description: [Relabel configs](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config) to apply to samples before ingestion.

scheme.description: (string) If set overrides the _Prometheus_ default scheme.

scrapeTimeout.description: (string) If set override the _Prometheus_ default scrape timeout.

shareProcessNamespace.description: If `true`, the `Pod` will have [process namespace sharing](https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/share-process-namespace/) enabled.

sourceNamespace.description:
Source namespace to watch for Kubernetes resources other than Gateway API gateways.
Used only when `namespaced=true`. Defaults to Release.Namespace

sources.description: _Kubernetes_ resources to monitor for DNS entries.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: (int) Termination grace period for the `Pod` in seconds.

tolerations.description: Node taints which will be tolerated for `Pod` [scheduling](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/).

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for `Pod` [scheduling](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/). If an explicit label selector is not provided one will be created from the pod selector labels.

triggerLoopOnEvent.description: If `true`, triggers run loop on create/update/delete events in addition of regular interval.

txtOwnerId.description: (string) Specify an identifier for this instance of _ExternalDNS_ when using a registry other than `noop`.

txtPrefix.description:
(string) Specify a prefix for the domain names of TXT records created for the `txt` registry.
Mutually exclusive with `txtSuffix`.

txtSuffix.description:
(string) Specify a suffix for the domain names of TXT records created for the `txt` registry.
Mutually exclusive with `txtPrefix`.
